x1~N(0,1)
x2~N(1,10)
x3~N(-1,20)
P(x1最大)=P(x1>x2) AND P(x1>x3)
-> P(x1-x2>0) and P(x1-x3)>0
x1-x2~ N(-1,11)
x1-x3~ N(1,21)
->
let p_1=P(x1=max(x1,x2,x3))=P(N(-1,11)>0)*P(N(1,21)>0)
p_3=P=(x1=min(x1,x2,x3))=P(N(-1,11)<0)*P(N(1,21)<0)
p_2=P(x1第2大)=1-p_1-p_3
